programmes.show_description: Rock Hard: Anarchic animated sitcom. While hanging around at an old record store, Peter and the guys tell stories about three rock music legends.
A Roger Story: US animated comedy series. Steve and Snot are forced to stop being friends after friction forms between their mothers, so they enlist Roger's help to break the ice.
Langley Dollar Listings: US animated comedy series. Francine and Roger become reality TV real estate agents, and the other Smiths start a coffee business in their front yard.
Wharf, Me Worry?: Animated comedy. The Belcher kids spend a special day with Big Bob at the Wharf that goes awry when they get into trouble with its new fortune-telling giant clam.
Bully-Ieve It or Not: Animated comedy. The Belcher kids uncover a secret about Zeke's past when a new student arrives at Wagstaff, and Bob rekindles his feud with Jimmy Pesto Sr.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
Animated series based on the DC Comics superhero team. Robin teaches his fellow Titans about health insurance.
Abducted Bunny / A New Job / Decoy / Skeleton: Animated series. Bugs Bunny is abducted by aliens, Elmer Fudd goes hunting with holograms, and Porky Pig has a bone to pick with Daffy.
The Midnight Zone: Animated adventures. When Cassidy is attacked by deep-sea robots, the gang decides to help her unravel the mystery of who is sending them and why.
Pizza O'Possum's: Animated adventure series. Shaggy drags the gang to an arcade where he's determined to win a prize he's always wanted from it, but its mascot has other ideas...
Mystery 101: Animated adventure series. Velma has got an interview at the prestigious Kingston University, but it comes with a catch - a ghost is haunting its book-filled halls!
The fashion-themed dating challenge continues. Whose style choices will impress Nate from Nottingham?
The Portugal trip is coming to an end - while some of the group have had a great time, others are looking forward to getting back to Essex and escaping the dramas.
The group are back in Essex as Dan gets some motherly advice from Wendy, Joe and Junaid spend quality time with Terry, and Diags surprises Bear with a teddy bear-themed party.
Tensions are still high in Essex as Saffron and Chloe's disagreement causes a rift and a divide, and Freddie, Joe, Junaid and Ella throw a party that has unexpected repercussions.
Stephen Mulhern hosts the exciting and iconic gameshow as another of his brave contestants takes on the infamous Banker for a chance to win a life-changing cash prize.
Stephen Mulhern hosts another exciting edition of the gameshow as one of his brave contestants takes on the infamous Banker and could be in with a chance of a life-changing prize.
Stephen Mulhern hosts the exciting and iconic gameshow as another of his brave contestants dares to take on the infamous Banker for a chance at a life-changing cash prize.
The auditions make their way to Birmingham, where guest judge Stacey Solomon joins the panel as performers try to impress the crowd and judges in the legendary Hippodrome theatre.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Charlotte Church, Melvin Odoom, and Katherine Ryan all trying to 'say what they see' in aid of charity.
Animated adventure comedy film featuring the voices of Chris Pratt and Anya Taylor-Joy, 2023. A pair of plumbers are transported into a magical land where a battle is raging.

Animated adventure comedy film featuring the voices of Chris Pratt and Anya Taylor-Joy, 2023. A pair of plumbers are transported into a magical land where a battle is raging.
Fantasy adventure film starring Charlie Cox and Claire Danes, 2007. A young man makes a promise to his beloved that he will retrieve a fallen star by venturing into a magical land.

Fantasy adventure film starring Charlie Cox and Claire Danes, 2007. A young man makes a promise to his beloved that he will retrieve a fallen star by venturing into a magical land.
Hilarious slapstick comedy film sequel starring Ben Stiller and Robert De Niro, 2004. All hell breaks loose when the Byrnes family meet the Focker family for the first time.

Hilarious slapstick comedy film sequel starring Ben Stiller and Robert De Niro, 2004. All hell breaks loose when the Byrnes family meet the Focker family for the first time.
Drunk with Power: Anarchic animated sitcom. Peter swaps lives with US Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh when they meet on a brewery tour and become best friends over a beer.
The Birthday Bootlegger: Anarchic animated sitcom. Peter's new boss bans his favourite part of work - office birthdays - and Stewie gets detention and turns rough.
Must Love Dogs: Anarchic animated sitcom. Quagmire pretends that Brian is his dog when he meets an avid dog lover, and Chris helps Stewie retrieve some stolen Halloween candy.
What Great Advancements!: US animated comedy series. In an episode paying homage to Charlie Chaplin, Stan is a modest inventor who leaves his farm to try his luck in the big city.
Epic Powder Dump: US animated comedy series. Stan takes his family out to replicate the ski trips from his childhood, and Klaus harbours a crush on a tech support operator.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
Animated series based on the DC Comics superhero team. When a package of theirs is stolen, the Titans must join a crew of porch pirates to get it back.
Boarding Games / Paintings / Winter Hungerland: Animated series. A kitten goes to doggy daycare, Porky Pig's pet paints a picture, and Wolf gets hungry in a winter wonderland.
Where Stalks the Scarebear: Animated adventures with Scooby and the gang. The mayor enlists the Mystery Inc. gang to investigate the sightings of a mutant bear.
Game of Chicken: Animated adventure series. Fred gets a call for help from his best friend to lead the gang on a rescue mission deep in the caverns of an ancient civilisation.
All Paws on Deck: Animated adventure series. The gang climb aboard a cruise ship run by Fred's cousin, but a water phobia is the least of their problems when a sea monster attacks!
Matt Edmondson narrates this series about the most entertaining Guinness World Records and the brilliant characters who set them as captured by TV shows around the globe.
Stylish Sanctuary Whistler: House-hunting show. Stephen and Ivan are moving to their dream location of Whistler and need a home that has views and is modern but with a rustic feel.
In London, Jessica, Shai and Harley all hope to impress model and personal trainer Robbie with their style choices.
There are much bigger things going on beneath the recent chaos in Essex as Courtney goes to see her sister while Saff goes to see Lauren and they bond over their shared grief.
Courtney brings Chloe and Saff together for a day out where the girls open up about how they feel, and Ella's invitation of Harry to a birthday party backfires due to a bombshell.
Stephen Mulhern hosts the exciting and iconic gameshow as another of his brave contestants steps up to take on the infamous Banker for a chance at a life-changing cash prize.
Samia Longchambon, Amy Dowden, and Will Best join Stephen Mulhern as they try to 'say what they see' and guess well-known phrases for their chance to win 50,000 pounds for charity.
Reality game show where celebrities cause chaos to win money for unsuspecting contestants of totally fake TV shows! Olivia Attwood joins as this week's rebellious Guest Saboteur.
Part-animated family adventure comedy film featuring the voice of Michael J Fox and starring Hugh Laurie, 1999. A family adopt a charming young mouse, but their cat hates the idea.

Part-animated family adventure comedy film featuring the voice of Michael J Fox and starring Hugh Laurie, 1999. A family adopt a charming young mouse, but their cat hates the idea.
The auditions return to Blackpool's Winter Gardens as further acts take to the stage with performances to impress the crowd and judges, Simon, Amanda, Alesha and KSI.
Teenager Jessie-Lou delivers a 'glorious' Les Miserables performance, and Stephen Greenwood pauses his honeymoon to audition and show off his impressive octave range.
Anarchic musical comedy film starring Jack Black and Joan Cusack, 2003. A slobbish guitarist poses as a supply teacher but ends up moulding his pupils to become rock music gods.

Bond film starring Daniel Craig and Christoph Waltz, 2015. 007 receives a cryptic message that sets him on the trail of a clandestine criminal organisation called SPECTRE.
Lois C.K.: Anarchic animated sitcom. Peter tries his best to straighten his life out when Lois becomes a stand-up comedian using real-life stories about him as her lead material.
The Fatman Always Rings Twice: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in Rhode Island. Peter does a noir-style investigation of Meg's disappearance.
80's Guy: Anarchic animated sitcom. Peter's nostalgia for the '80s compels him to recreate iconic film scenes from that decade, and Stewie competes with Doug to retrieve a frisbee.
